format: TOEIC Part 7 長文読解問題
instructions: 以下の各問題で、文書を読み、各設問に答えてください。

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: All Employees
From: HR Department
Subject: Holiday Schedule

The office will be closed on Monday, May 5th, in observance of Labor Day. Normal business hours will resume on Tuesday, May 6th. Please plan your work accordingly. If you have any urgent matters, contact your supervisor before Friday.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the purpose of the email?
When will the office reopen?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Parking is restricted to permit holders only between 8 a.m. and 6 p.m., Monday through Friday. Vehicles without a permit will be towed at the owner's expense. Visitors may park in the designated area behind the building.

subQuestions.questionText: When can permit holders park?
Where can visitors park?

questions.text:
ADVERTISEMENT
Buy one, get one free on all coffee drinks! Offer valid this weekend only at all downtown locations. Cannot be combined with other discounts. Present this ad at the counter.

subQuestions.questionText: What is being offered?
When is the offer valid?

questions.text:
MEMO
TO: Sales Team
FROM: Regional Manager

All sales reports must be submitted electronically by Friday, March 15th. Paper submissions will no longer be accepted. Please use the new template available on the company portal. Late submissions may affect quarterly bonuses.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the deadline for submissions?
What will happen to late submissions?

questions.text:
CHAT
A: Can you attend the 2 p.m. meeting?
B: I have another appointment. Can we reschedule?
A: How about 4 p.m.?
B: That works. See you then.
A: Great. I'll book the conference room.

subQuestions.questionText: Why can't B attend at 2 p.m.?
What time did they agree to meet?

questions.text:
INVOICE
Invoice #: 2025-101
Date: March 10, 2025
Customer: Tanaka Office Solutions
Description: Office chairs (20 units)
Total: $2,400
Due Date: April 9, 2025
Please include invoice number with payment.

subQuestions.questionText: What was purchased?
When is payment due?

questions.text:
WEBSITE
Check-in: 3:00 PM
Check-out: 11:00 AM
Free Wi-Fi included. Breakfast available 7-10 AM ($15 per person). Parking: $20 per night. Cancellation: Free up to 48 hours before arrival.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the check-out time?
How much does parking cost?

questions.text:
REVIEW
I stayed at the Grand Hotel for two nights. The location is great, close to the train station. The room was clean but small. The staff was friendly. However, the breakfast was overpriced at $25. I would stay here again for the location.

subQuestions.questionText: What is mentioned as a positive?
What does the reviewer say about breakfast?

questions.text:
LETTER
Dear Ms. Sato,

Thank you for your application. We were impressed with your qualifications and would like to invite you for an interview on Monday, June 10th at 10 a.m. Please bring two references. Confirm your availability by Friday.

Sincerely,
Hiring Manager

subQuestions.questionText: What is the purpose of the letter?
What must Ms. Sato bring?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Please turn off all lights and lock the doors before leaving. The alarm will activate at 8 p.m. automatically. Do not leave any windows open. Report any issues to security at extension 5500.

subQuestions.questionText: What time does the alarm activate?
What should employees do before leaving?
options: Turn off lights and lock doors

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: support@tech.com
From: david.kim@email.com
Subject: Order #8842

I received my order today, but one item is missing. I ordered three wireless mice, but only two were in the box. Please send the missing item or issue a refund. My order number is #8842.

subQuestions.questionText: What is David's problem?
How many mice did David receive?

questions.text:
ANNOUNCEMENT
We are pleased to announce that Maria Santos has been promoted to Senior Manager. Maria has been with the company for six years and has led the marketing team to record growth. Please join us for a celebration on Friday at 3 p.m. in the cafeteria.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the announcement about?
How long has Maria been with the company?

questions.text:
TEXT MESSAGE
Mom: Don't forget to pick up milk and bread.
Tom: OK. Anything else?
Mom: Yes, we also need eggs and butter.
Tom: Got it. I'll be home by 6.
Mom: Thanks. Drive safely.

subQuestions.questionText: What does Tom need to buy?
When will Tom be home?

questions.text:
BROCHURE
Visit Central Park Zoo! Open daily 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. Admission: Adults $15, Children (3-12) $8, Seniors $10. Free parking available. Guided tours at 11 a.m. and 2 p.m. No outside food or drinks allowed.

subQuestions.questionText: How much is admission for an adult?
What time are guided tours?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: All Staff
From: IT Department
Subject: System Maintenance

The server will be offline on Saturday from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. During this time, you cannot access email or shared files. Please save all work before Friday. Contact IT if you have questions.

subQuestions.questionText: When will the server be offline?
What should employees do before Friday?

questions.text:
RECEIPT
Store: Green Market
Date: March 5, 2025
Items:
- Apples (3) $4.50
- Milk (1) $3.99
- Bread (1) $2.50
- Eggs (1) $3.00
Total: $13.99
Payment: Credit Card
Thank you for shopping!

subQuestions.questionText: How much was the total?
How did the customer pay?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Library Hours Update
Starting next Monday, the library will close at 8 p.m. on weekdays and 5 p.m. on weekends. Regular hours (9 a.m. to 9 p.m.) will resume in September. We apologize for any inconvenience.

subQuestions.questionText: What time does the library close on weekdays?
When will regular hours resume?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: john.tanaka@email.com
From: events@cityhall.com
Subject: Community Event

Dear Mr. Tanaka,

You are invited to the annual community festival on Saturday, April 12th from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. at City Park. There will be food, music, and activities for children. Admission is free. Please RSVP by April 5th.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the event?
When must Mr. Tanaka RSVP?

questions.text:
ARTICLE
Local bakery Sweet Treats won the "Best Dessert" award at the annual food festival. Owner Maria Gomez started the bakery five years ago. The winning item was a chocolate cake with raspberry filling. The bakery is located at 123 Main Street.

subQuestions.questionText: What award did Sweet Treats win?
How long ago did Maria Gomez start the bakery?

questions.text:
CHAT
Sarah: Did you finish the report?
Mike: Almost. I just need to add the charts.
Sarah: When can you send it?
Mike: By 3 p.m. today.
Sarah: Perfect. Let me know when it's ready.

subQuestions.questionText: What does Mike still need to do?
When will Mike send the report?

questions.text:
SIGN
Construction Zone
Please use alternate route
Monday - Friday: 7 a.m. - 6 p.m.
Weekend: No construction
Thank you for your patience

subQuestions.questionText: When does construction occur?
What are drivers advised to do?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: All Staff
From: Finance Department
Subject: Payroll Schedule

Due to the holiday, payroll will be processed one day earlier than usual. Please submit your timesheets by Wednesday, November 20th. Late submissions will be processed in the next pay period.

subQuestions.questionText: Why is payroll being processed early?
When must timesheets be submitted?

questions.text:
MENU
Sunset Diner
Breakfast served all day
- Pancakes $8.99
- Omelette $10.99
- French Toast $9.99
- Coffee $2.50
- Orange Juice $3.00
Add bacon or sausage $3.00

subQuestions.questionText: How much is an omelette?
What is the cost to add bacon?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Pool Rules
1. Shower before entering
2. No running on deck
3. Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult
4. No glass containers
5. Swim at your own risk
Violators will be asked to leave.

subQuestions.questionText: What is required before entering the pool?
Who must be accompanied by an adult?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: reservations@hotel.com
From: emma.wong@email.com
Subject: Booking change

Dear Sir or Madam,

I have a reservation for June 15th under the name Emma Wong. I need to change it to June 22nd. Is the same room available? Please let me know. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: What does Emma want to do?
What is Emma's original reservation date?

questions.text:
ADVERTISEMENT
Spring Sale at Fashion Outlet!
All items 30-50% off
- Dresses: 40% off
- Jeans: 30% off
- Jackets: 50% off
- Shoes: Buy one, get one 50% off
Sale ends March 31st. Don't miss out!

subQuestions.questionText: What is the discount on jackets?
When does the sale end?

questions.text:
REVIEW
I bought a laptop from this store. Shipping was fast, and the price was good. However, customer service was slow when I had a question. I would still recommend them for prices, but be patient with support.

subQuestions.questionText: What is mentioned as positive?
What does the reviewer say about customer service?

questions.text:
MEMO
TO: All Employees
FROM: Office Manager
SUBJECT: Desk Cleaning

Please remove all personal items from your desks by Friday, April 10th. The office will be cleaned and repainted over the weekend. You may return items on Monday, April 13th. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the deadline to remove personal items?
Why are employees removing items?

questions.text:
TEXT MESSAGE
Lisa: Are you coming to the party?
Tom: What time does it start?
Lisa: 7 p.m. at my place.
Tom: I'll be there around 8. I have a meeting.
Lisa: No problem. See you then!

subQuestions.questionText: What time does the party start?
Why will Tom be late?

questions.text:
FLYER
Yoga Class at Community Center
Mondays and Wednesdays
6:30 p.m. - 7:30 p.m.
$15 per class or $50 for 4 classes
Bring your own mat. Beginners welcome. Register at the front desk.

subQuestions.questionText: What days are the classes held?
How much is a single class?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: marketing@company.com
From: client@email.com
Subject: Campaign feedback

Dear Team,

I reviewed the proposed marketing campaign. The concept is strong, but the budget is too high. Can you provide a revised version with a 20% cost reduction? Please send by Friday. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the client's main concern?
What does the client request?

questions.text:
SCHEDULE
Conference Agenda - May 10th
9:00 AM: Registration
10:00 AM: Keynote Speech
12:00 PM: Lunch
1:30 PM: Workshop A (Marketing)
1:30 PM: Workshop B (Finance)
3:30 PM: Panel Discussion
5:00 PM: Closing Remarks

subQuestions.questionText: What time is the keynote speech?
How many workshops are offered at 1:30 PM?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Lost and Found
A black backpack was found in the cafeteria. It contains a laptop and notebooks. Please claim at the security desk. Describe the contents for verification. Unclaimed items will be donated after 30 days.

subQuestions.questionText: What was found?
Where can the owner claim it?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: All Staff
From: HR
Subject: New Hire Announcement

Please welcome James Chen as our new IT Manager. James joins us from Tech Solutions, where he worked for eight years. He starts on Monday, April 15th. Stop by his office to say hello.

subQuestions.questionText: What is James Chen's new position?
When does James start?

questions.text:
ADVERTISEMENT
Gym Membership Special
Join now and pay $0 enrollment fee!
Monthly fee: $39.99
Includes: All classes, gym access, locker room
24/7 access with keycard
First month free with annual contract

subQuestions.questionText: What is the monthly fee?
What is included in the membership?

questions.text:
CHAT
Boss: Can you work overtime tonight?
Employee: How many hours?
Boss: About 3 hours, until 8 p.m.
Employee: I can do 2 hours but not 3. I have a prior commitment.
Boss: 2 hours works. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: How many hours will the employee work?
Why can't the employee work 3 hours?

questions.text:
INVOICE
Invoice #: 2025-205
Date: May 1, 2025
Customer: Green Energy Co.
Description: Solar panel installation
Amount: $12,500
Deposit paid: $5,000
Balance due: $7,500
Due date: June 1, 2025

subQuestions.questionText: What is the total amount of the invoice?
What is the balance due?

questions.text:
WEBSITE
Product Return Policy
Items may be returned within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Customer pays return shipping. Refunds issued within 5 business days of receiving return. Final sale items cannot be returned.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the return period?
Who pays return shipping?

questions.text:
LETTER
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that our downtown location will close permanently on June 30th. All remaining inventory is 40% off. Thank you for your years of support. Please visit our online store or other locations.

subQuestions.questionText: What is happening on June 30th?
What discount is offered?

questions.text:
ARTICLE
City council approved a new budget for road repairs yesterday. The $5 million project will repave 20 miles of roads in the downtown area. Work is scheduled to begin in July and will take approximately six months. Drivers should expect delays.

subQuestions.questionText: How much is the road repair budget?
How long will the project take?

questions.text:
TEXT MESSAGE
A: The meeting was moved to 11 a.m.
B: Thanks for letting me know. Is it still in Room 301?
A: No, it's now in Room 405.
B: Got it. See you there.

subQuestions.questionText: What time is the meeting now?
What room is the meeting in?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Office Kitchen Rules
- Clean up after yourself
- Label your food in the refrigerator
- Do not leave dishes in the sink
- Coffee is $0.50 per cup (honor system)
- Violations may result in loss of kitchen privileges

subQuestions.questionText: What is required for food in the refrigerator?
How much does coffee cost?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: customer.service@store.com
From: anna.lee@email.com
Subject: Wrong item received

I received my order today, but the color is wrong. I ordered a blue jacket, but received a black one. Please send me the blue one or issue a refund. Order #3352. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: What problem does Anna have?
What color did Anna order?

questions.text:
FLYER
Blood Drive at City Hall
Wednesday, May 20th
9:00 AM - 3:00 PM
Free t-shirt for donors
Appointments recommended, walk-ins welcome
Bring photo ID
Snacks provided after donation

subQuestions.questionText: What do donors receive?
What is required to donate?

questions.text:
REVIEW
This restaurant has great food, but the service is slow. I waited 20 minutes just to get a menu. The pasta was delicious, though. I would come back for the food but hope they improve the service.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the reviewer's main complaint?
What does the reviewer say about the pasta?

questions.text:
MEMO
TO: Research Team
FROM: Project Lead
SUBJECT: Deadline Extension

The deadline for the preliminary report has been extended to May 10th. This gives us an extra week. Please use this time to verify your data. Final report deadline remains May 30th.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the new deadline for the preliminary report?
What is the team asked to do with the extra time?

questions.text:
ADVERTISEMENT
Spring Cleaning Sale!
All furniture 25% off
Carpets 30% off
Lighting 20% off
Free delivery on orders over $500
Sale ends Sunday. In-store only.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the discount on carpets?
When does the sale end?

questions.text:
CHAT
Customer: My order hasn't arrived yet. It was supposed to be here yesterday.
Support: I'm sorry. Can I have your order number?
Customer: #7721.
Support: I see a delay. It will arrive tomorrow. I've refunded the shipping fee.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the customer's problem?
What did support do for the customer?

questions.text:
SIGN
Quiet Zone
Please respect our neighbors
No loud music
No parties after 10 p.m.
Violators will be reported to management
Thank you for your cooperation

subQuestions.questionText: What is prohibited after 10 p.m.?
What will happen to violators?
options: They will be reported to management

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: All Staff
From: Facilities
Subject: Office Temperature

We have received complaints that the office is too cold. The thermostat is set to 72°F. Please dress appropriately. Space heaters are not allowed due to fire safety. Thank you for understanding.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the thermostat set to?
Why are space heaters not allowed?

questions.text:
NEWSLETTER
March 2025
Employee of the Month: Sarah Wong
Sarah has been with us for three years. She exceeded her sales target by 25% this quarter. She also volunteered to train new team members. Congratulations, Sarah!

subQuestions.questionText: Who is Employee of the Month?
By how much did Sarah exceed her sales target?

questions.text:
TEXT MESSAGE
Landlord: Rent is due on the 1st of each month.
Tenant: I know. I'll pay tomorrow.
Landlord: There is a $50 late fee after the 5th.
Tenant: I understand. I'll pay tomorrow for sure.

subQuestions.questionText: When is rent normally due?
What happens after the 5th?

questions.text:
BROCHURE
Museum of Natural History
Hours: 10 AM - 5 PM daily
Admission: Adults $12, Children $6, Seniors $8
Free admission on first Tuesday of each month
Special exhibit: Dinosaurs of Asia (through August)

subQuestions.questionText: How much is adult admission?
When is admission free?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: team@project.com
From: manager@project.com
Subject: Meeting canceled

The 2 p.m. meeting is canceled. The client had to reschedule. I will send a new meeting invite once we have a confirmed time. Please use this time to work on your individual tasks. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: Why was the meeting canceled?
What should team members do instead?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Elevator out of service
We apologize for the inconvenience
The elevator will be repaired by Friday
Please use the stairs
For assistance, call maintenance at ext. 3344
Thank you for your patience

subQuestions.questionText: When will the elevator be repaired?
What should people use instead?

questions.text:
REVIEW
This is my third time staying at this hotel. The staff always remembers my name. The rooms are clean, and the location is perfect. Breakfast could be better, but overall, I highly recommend it.

subQuestions.questionText: How many times has the reviewer stayed here?
What is mentioned as a positive?

questions.text:
INVOICE
Service: Website design
Date: March 1, 2025
Amount: $2,500
Payment terms: 50% upfront, 50% upon completion
Status: 50% paid ($1,250)
Remaining: $1,250 due upon completion

subQuestions.questionText: What is the total cost of the service?
How much has been paid already?

questions.text:
CHAT
A: Did you see the email about the new policy?
B: Yes, but I don't understand the part about overtime.
A: It says overtime needs manager approval.
B: That's what I thought. Thanks for clarifying.

subQuestions.questionText: What does the new policy require for overtime?
What does B need clarification on?

questions.text:
ADVERTISEMENT
Car Wash Special
Full service wash only $19.99
Includes: Exterior wash, interior vacuum, window cleaning
Upgrade to premium for $29.99 (includes wax and tire shine)
Open 8 AM - 6 PM daily

subQuestions.questionText: How much is the full service wash?
What does the premium upgrade include?

questions.text:
MEMO
TO: Marketing Team
FROM: Director
SUBJECT: Budget Cuts

Due to lower than expected revenue, all departments must reduce spending by 10% this quarter. Please review your expenses and identify areas to cut. Submit your revised budget by Friday. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: Why are budget cuts necessary?
What percentage must be cut?

questions.text:
WEBSITE
Shipping Information
Standard shipping: 5-7 business days ($5.99)
Express shipping: 2-3 business days ($12.99)
Overnight shipping: 1 business day ($24.99)
Free standard shipping on orders over $50

subQuestions.questionText: How much does express shipping cost?
When is standard shipping free?

questions.text:
LETTER
Dear Parent,

School will be closed on Friday, April 18th for teacher training. Classes will resume on Monday, April 21st. After-school programs are also canceled on the 18th. We apologize for any inconvenience.

subQuestions.questionText: Why is school closed on April 18th?
When do classes resume?

questions.text:
TEXT MESSAGE
Doctor: Your test results came back normal.
Patient: That's a relief. Thank you.
Doctor: I still want to see you for a follow-up in 3 months.
Patient: I'll schedule that. Thanks again.

subQuestions.questionText: What did the test results show?
When does the doctor want a follow-up?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Please do not leave personal belongings unattended. Theft has been reported in this area. Lockers are available for $2 per day at the front desk. The management is not responsible for lost or stolen items.

subQuestions.questionText: What has been reported in the area?
How much do lockers cost?

questions.text:
ARTICLE
A new coffee shop opened on Main Street yesterday. The owner, Tom Kim, previously worked as a barista in Seattle. The shop uses organic beans and offers free Wi-Fi. It is open 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. daily.

subQuestions.questionText: What did Tom Kim do before opening the shop?
What is offered for free?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: All Residents
From: Building Manager
Subject: Pest Control

Pest control will be conducted in all units on Tuesday, May 20th between 9 a.m. and 5 p.m. Please ensure your unit is accessible. If you have pets, please make arrangements. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: What is happening on May 20th?
What should residents do about pets?

questions.text:
REVIEW
I tried this new restaurant last night. The atmosphere is nice, but the portions are small for the price. I paid $25 for a pasta dish and was still hungry. The service was friendly, though. Not sure I'll return.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the reviewer's main complaint?
How much did the reviewer pay for pasta?

questions.text:
SCHEDULE
Flight 204: Tokyo to Osaka
Depart: 9:30 AM
Arrive: 10:45 AM
Gate: B12
Status: On time
Boarding begins at 8:55 AM

subQuestions.questionText: What time does the flight arrive?
What is the gate number?

questions.text:
MEMO
TO: All Staff
FROM: IT Department
SUBJECT: Password Update

Please update your passwords by March 31st. Passwords must be at least 8 characters and include a number. You will be locked out after three failed attempts. Contact IT for assistance.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the deadline for updating passwords?
What happens after three failed attempts?

questions.text:
CHAT
Sarah: Are you coming to the team lunch?
Mike: What time?
Sarah: 12:30 p.m. at the new Italian place.
Mike: I have a call at 1 p.m. Can we do 11:30?
Sarah: That works for me. I'll tell the others.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the original lunch time?
Why does Mike want to change the time?
options: He has a call at 1 p.m.

questions.text:
NOTICE
Lost cat
Female, black and white, answers to "Luna"
Lost near Maple Street on May 1st
Reward $100
Please call 555-1234 with any information

subQuestions.questionText: What is the cat's name?
What is the reward amount?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: support@software.com
From: user@email.com
Subject: Login issue

I cannot log into my account. I tried resetting my password, but I never received the reset email. Please help me regain access. My username is user123. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: What problem is the user having?
What did the user try to do?

questions.text:
FLYER
Community Garden Plot Rental
$40 per year (April - October)
Includes water and tools
Must attend one workshop
Limited plots available
Sign up by March 31st at City Hall

subQuestions.questionText: How much does a plot cost per year?
What is required to rent a plot?

questions.text:
ARTICLE
Local artist Yuki Tanaka will exhibit her paintings at the City Art Gallery from June 1st to June 30th. The exhibition features 20 new works inspired by nature. An opening reception will be held on June 1st at 7 p.m. Admission is free.

subQuestions.questionText: Where is the exhibition?
When is the opening reception?

questions.text:
TEXT MESSAGE
Mom: Did you take out the trash?
Son: Not yet. I'll do it after dinner.
Mom: The garbage truck comes early tomorrow.
Son: OK, I'll do it right now.
Mom: Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: What does the son need to do?
Why is the son doing it right now?

questions.text:
INVOICE
Service: Plumbing repair
Date: May 10, 2025
Description: Fixed leaking sink in kitchen
Labor: $120
Parts: $45
Total: $165
Paid: $165
Balance: $0
Thank you for your business.

subQuestions.questionText: What was repaired?
How much was the total cost?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Please return all library books by May 30th. The library will be closed for inventory from June 1st to June 7th. No fines will be charged during the closure. We will reopen on June 8th.

subQuestions.questionText: Why will the library be closed?
When will the library reopen?

questions.text:
REVIEW
I bought a pair of shoes from this website. They arrived in two days, which was impressive. However, they were too small. The return process was easy, and I got a refund within a week. Would buy again.

subQuestions.questionText: How long did shipping take?
Why did the reviewer return the shoes?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: All Members
From: Gym Management
Subject: Holiday Hours

On Memorial Day (May 26th), the gym will be open from 8 a.m. to 2 p.m. Group classes are canceled. Regular hours (5 a.m. to 10 p.m.) resume on May 27th. Thank you.

subQuestions.questionText: What are the gym hours on May 26th?
What is canceled on May 26th?

questions.text:
CHAT
Boss: The client wants changes to the design.
Employee: What kind of changes?
Boss: Colors and layout.
Employee: I can do that. When is the deadline?
Boss: End of the week. Is that possible?
Employee: Yes, I'll prioritize this.

subQuestions.questionText: What changes does the client want?
When is the deadline?

questions.text:
ADVERTISEMENT
Pet Adoption Event
Saturday, June 7th
10 a.m. - 3 p.m.
At the City Animal Shelter
Dogs and cats available
Adoption fees waived
All pets are vaccinated and spayed/neutered

subQuestions.questionText: What is being waived?
What is true about the pets?

questions.text:
MEMO
TO: Sales Team
FROM: VP of Sales
SUBJECT: New CRM System

We will switch to a new CRM system on June 1st. Training sessions will be held on May 28th and May 29th. Attendance is mandatory. Please bring your laptop. The old system will be deactivated on May 31st.

subQuestions.questionText: When will the new system be activated?
What is mandatory?

questions.text:
WEBSITE
Job Opening: Administrative Assistant
Full-time, Monday-Friday 9 a.m. - 5 p.m.
Requirements: 2 years experience, MS Office proficiency
Benefits: Health insurance, paid time off, 401k
Apply by May 30th at careers.company.com

subQuestions.questionText: What is the deadline to apply?
What software proficiency is required?

questions.text:
TEXT MESSAGE
Friend: Are we still meeting for dinner?
You: Yes, what time?
Friend: 7 p.m. at the usual place?
You: Can we do 7:30? I'm running late.
Friend: Sure. See you then.

subQuestions.questionText: What is the original meeting time?
Why does the person want to change the time?

questions.text:
NOTICE
Water shutoff notice
The water will be turned off on Thursday, June 12th from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m. for maintenance. Please plan accordingly. We apologize for the inconvenience. Thank you for your understanding.

subQuestions.questionText: How long will the water be off?
What is the reason for the shutoff?

questions.text:
EMAIL
To: customer@email.com
From: store@retail.com
